(ii) TTT.^T.f^. & 548(sr) T T ^ 5 sir^r, 2002 *fiT (iii) OT.3T A #. 89(sr) ^T^w 10 <J^r*t, 2009 MINISTRY OF HOME AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 24th May. 2018 G.S.R. 487<Et.—!n exercise of the powers conferred by subjection (il of section 5 of the Vice-President's Pension Act. 1997 [30 of 1997). the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Vice- President's Pension, Housing and Other Facilities Rules. 1999, namely:- 1. Short title and commencement - (1) These rules may be called the Vk-c-Preside tit's Pension. Housing and Other Facilities (Amendment) Rules. 201S. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in Ihe Official Gazette. 2. EH the Vice-President's Pension, Housing and Other Facilities Rules. 1999. in rule 4. in suh-iulu (i i, lor clause (b). the following clause shall he subsiituted and shall be deemed to have been substituted with effect from the 1st day of April, 2018. "lb) during each financial year, an amount not exceeding Rs, 90,000/- (Rupees ninety thousand only) shall be paid to every retired Vice-President towards the actual charges incurred h) him on account of office expenses". IF. No. I/I/2016-M&CJ S. K. SHAM. JL Secy.
